description: Indexes one or more Fasta files for use in the HISAT2.aligner.
author: Ted Liefeld;UCSD
plan:
## HISAT2.indexer GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
HISAT2.indexer is a GenePattern module that Indexes one or more Fasta files for use in the HISAT2.aligner.

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 4 parameters:
- Required: index.name.prefix, fasta.file, dry.run
- Optional: gtf.file

### 3. Command Line
```
python <libdir>/hisat_indexer_wrapper.py <gtf.file> -fasta <fasta.file> -indexname <index.name.prefix> -dryRun <dry.run>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: genepattern/docker-hisat2\:v0.12

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: index.name.prefix
parameters.description: The name prefix of the resulting index files and of the zip file which contains them.

parameters.name: fasta.file
parameters.description: One or more FASTA files (or a zip file containing one or more FASTA files) containing the reference sequences to be aligned to. E.g., <reference_in> might be chr1.fa,chr2.fa,chrX.fa,chrY.fa.

parameters.name: gtf.file
parameters.description: Optional GTF file with information about exons.  If present this will run extract_exons.py and extrac_splice_sites.py on the GTF file and then add the splice sites and exons to the index

parameters.name: dry.run
parameters.description: If true, this just generates the hisat2 command lines and exits without executing.
